en.name: Roast Goose (Half)
en.shortDescription: Roast Goose (Half) — traditional northeast Chinese roast goose. Ready-to-eat.
en.description: Roast Goose (Half) is a premium Chinese agricultural product sourced from Heilongjiang, Harbin. Carefully selected, quality-controlled, and packaged for export. Suitable for wholesale distribution, food service, and retail.
